Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can borrow Igor's power to {f 0 1 2}fuse new Personas{f 0 1 27} in the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Fusing Personas is crucial in overpowering enemy Shadows. First, try fusing the Personas in your possession.[n]{f 1 1}
